description: Wrap your little one in warmth and style with our Baby Fleece Star Hoodie, designed for boys and girls. This soft, oversized snuggle top is perfect for keeping your baby cozy during cool days. Whether it's for playtime, outings, or just snuggling at home, this adorable hoodie is a must-have for your baby’s wardrobe. Available in two beautiful colors—blue and pink—this hoodie comes in three convenient sizes to fit babies from 6 months to 3 years: * 6-12 months * 12-24 months * 2-3 years The stylish star pattern adds a fun, playful touch to the hoodie, while the fleece fabric ensures warmth and comfort. The oversized fit gives your baby plenty of room to move around freely, making it great for everyday wear or layering during colder months. The hood adds extra warmth and a cute look that both parents and kids will love! Key Features: * Soft Fleece Fabric: Keeps your baby warm and cozy, ideal for cooler weather. * Star Print Design: Adorable star pattern adds a charming and playful style. * Unisex Colors: Choose from blue or pink to suit any baby’s wardrobe. * Multiple Sizes: Available in sizes 6-12 months, 12-24 months, and 2-3 years for a perfect fit as your baby grows. * Oversized Snuggle Fit: Designed for comfort, giving your baby room to move and grow. * Easy Care: Machine washable, keeping the hoodie soft and vibrant after every wash. Perfect for layering during outdoor adventures or snuggling at home, the Baby Fleece Star Hoodie combines comfort, style, and practicality. Whether it’s a gift or a new wardrobe staple, this hoodie will keep your little star cozy and happy.
